description: The explicit-parentheses command form `(print value)` (issue #93) is handled identically to the plain infix form `print value`: it parses as a top-level `ParenCall` node (not `Call`), and its argument still evaluates and reaches a `print` trace event carrying the value in `values` (issue #98's variadic-ready payload shape): 1 + 2 = 3.
